title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales

jsonLd.title: Principal Visual Merchandiser at Vijay Sales
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Vijay Sales in Madurai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijay Sales:
Vijay Sales is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijay Sales!
